# IcebergIOManager

ConfigurableIOManager that wraps the official `dagster-iceberg` package's PyArrowIcebergIOManager. Supports REST, Hive, and Glue catalogs via the standard Iceberg catalog config. Each asset becomes a namespaced Iceberg table; partitioned assets get one Iceberg-partition per Dagster-partition.

This component **wraps the official `dagster-iceberg` package** rather than reimplementing the IO manager — gets us format compatibility, schema evolution, partition handling, etc. for free.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `namespace` | `str` | Iceberg namespace (e.g. 'analytics'). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"io_manager"` | Dagster resource key. Use 'io_manager' to make this the default. |
| `warehouse` | `str` | — | Warehouse path (s3://, gs://, file://). |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `catalog_name` | `str` | `"default"` | Catalog name to load. |
| `catalog_uri` | `str` | — | REST/Hive catalog URI. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.IcebergIOManagerComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: io_manager
  catalog_name: <fill in>
  namespace: <fill in>
  catalog_uri: <fill in>
  warehouse: <fill in>
```

## Requirements

```
dagster
dagster-iceberg
pyarrow
```
